breaking.title: Seven killed, more than 50 wounded in Ukrainian drone attack on Russian regions
breaking.summary: Ukrainian special operations also conducted strikes against targets in the Sea of Azov and in occupied territory, Mr. Zelenskyy said

breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: U.S.-Iran fighting escalates with infrastructure targeted
breaking.summary: The United States and Iran exchanged strikes aimed at infrastructure and military targets, while GCC head condemned the recent Iranian attacks, labelling them as  “war crimes”

breaking.title: At least four dead, many injured in blast-fire at illegal Ahmedabad firecracker unit
breaking.summary: The unit, set up on an open farm, was operating without a valid licence, Joint Commissioner of Police Jaipal Singh Rathore said

breaking.title: Russian online retail warehouses hit by deadly Ukrainian strikes
breaking.summary: Drones targeted Wildberries facilities near Moscow and in Tambov. Ukraine's leader called them "major logistics facilities" supplying "sanctioned components".

breaking.title: Former Prime Minister H.D. Deve Gowda’s wife Chennamma passes away
breaking.summary: She had been admitted to Manipal Hospital in Bengaluru with breathing complications, chest congestion and other age-related complications

breaking.title: Sonam Wangchuk hunger strike LIVE: CJP's Dipke says Delhi Police planning overnight 'crackdown' on Jantar Mantar protest, calls for night vigil
breaking.summary: Sonam Wangchuk continues to refuse medical intervention as wife Gitanjali alleges 'lack of transparency' at hospital

breaking.title: Why was Ice Poseidon’s Indian VISA revoked? Streamer says it was linked to fellow Kick creator
breaking.summary: Kick streamer Ice Poseidon's planned India trip was cancelled after his visa was revoked. He learned his visa was denied due to his contact, Deepak, who has alleged criminal issues. Authorities reportedly stated they would not accept him into India based on Deepak's information. Deepak was allegedly involved in a fireworks incident where a girl was injured. Ice Poseidon presented this gathered information as his reason for denial.

breaking.title: US strikes hit Iran for seventh consecutive night
breaking.summary: Iran has retaliated against US allies in the region, with Kuwait reporting that a power and water plant had been hit.
